104467.name: Expected Years of Schooling (years)
104467.description: The number of years of schooling that a child of school entrance age can expect to receive if prevailing patterns of age-specific enrollment rates persist throughout the child’s life.

source.name: UNDP, HDR (2018)
source.additionalInfo: This series was published by the United Nations Development Programme (UNDP) Human Development Reports (HDR), which combines data from: UNESCO Institute for Statistics (2018); ICF Macro Demographic and Health Surveys; UNICEF Multiple Indicator Cluster Surveys; and OECD (2017a).

176102.name: Annual CO2 emissions (per capita)
176102.description: Annual production-based emissions of carbon dioxide (CO2), measured in tonnes per person. This is based on territorial emissions, which do not account for emissions embedded in traded goods.
176102.datasetName: Global Carbon Budget - Global Carbon Project (2020)
176102.s_name: Our World in Data based on the Global Carbon Project

source.name: Our World in Data based on the Global Carbon Project
source.dataPublishedBy: Our World in Data based on the Global Carbon Project
source.additionalInfo:
The Global Carbon Budget dataset is available at https://folk.universitetetioslo.no/roberan/GCB2020.shtml (1750-2019) and https://doi.org/10.18160/GCP-2020 (1959-2019).

Full reference for the Global Carbon Budget - Global Carbon Project (2020) dataset: Friedlingstein et al, Global Carbon Budget 2020, Earth Syst. Sci. Data, 12, 3269–3340, https://doi.org/10.5194/essd-12-3269-2020, 2020.

Our World in Data have renamed the category "bunker fuels" as "International transport" for improved clarity, which includes emissions from international aviation and shipping.

Population figures are sourced from Gapminder (v6), HYDE (2016) and United Nations Population Division (2019). Links: https://www.gapminder.org/data/documentation/gd003/; https://population.un.org/wpp/Download/Standard/Population/; https://www.pbl.nl/en/image/links/hyde

352.name: South Georgia and the South Sandwich Islands
